context: Tests whether the agent generates eval criteria.json files using the required checklist category taxonomy (INTENT, DESIGN, MUST_NOT, MINIMALITY, REUSE, INTEGRATION, EDGE_CASE), and whether task.md files include the required structural sections (Setup, Task, Expected Behavior).

checklist.name: criteria.json has category field
checklist.description: At least one criteria.json under evals/ contains a 'category' field on checklist items

checklist.name: Valid category values used
checklist.description: All 'category' values in criteria.json are from the set: INTENT, DESIGN, MUST_NOT, MINIMALITY, REUSE, INTEGRATION, EDGE_CASE — no custom or invented categories

checklist.name: task.md has Setup section
checklist.description: Each eval task.md contains a '## Setup' section

checklist.name: task.md has Task section
checklist.description: Each eval task.md contains a '## Task' section

checklist.name: task.md has Expected Behavior section
checklist.description: Each eval task.md contains an '## Expected Behavior' section

checklist.name: Scores sum to 100
checklist.description: The sum of all max_score values in each criteria.json equals exactly 100

checklist.name: Multiple category types represented
checklist.description: The criteria.json checklist items use at least 3 distinct category values (not all INTENT)

checklist.name: Minimum 2 eval scenarios
checklist.description: The evals/ directory contains at least 2 scenario subfolders each with task.md and criteria.json

checklist.name: criteria.json has context field
checklist.description: Each criteria.json contains a 'context' field with a description of what is being evaluated
